prompt: Please run the URG-4 Universal Real GUI Computer Use observe-plan-act-verify loop acceptance. Use only the project terminal self-check command in safe recording-sender contract mode. Do not interact with any user window, do not open real apps, do not click, do not type into the desktop, do not install dependencies, do not change registry, and do not change Windows settings. The final answer must include the fixed marker: PHASE119_UNIVERSAL_OBSERVE_PLAN_ACT_VERIFY_READY. You must call the terminal tool and run this verification command: $env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use.universal_observe_plan_act_verify import main; raise SystemExit(main([]))" Do not write the final answer early. Only after the terminal command prints PHASE119_UNIVERSAL_OBSERVE_PLAN_ACT_VERIFY_OK, the final answer's last line must completely copy: PHASE119_UNIVERSAL_OBSERVE_PLAN_ACT_VERIFY_READY PHASE119_UNIVERSAL_OBSERVE_PLAN_ACT_VERIFY_OK observe_plan_act_verify_loop=true before_after_observation_per_action=true verification_decides_next_step=true bounded_retry=true failure_exits_with_evidence_and_cleanup=true same_loop_handles_representative_samples=true notepad_sample_passed=true calculator_sample_passed=true paint_sample_passed=true per_app_controller_required=false hardcoded_app_whitelist_required=false target_identity_rechecked_before_each_action=true target_drift_zero_events=true abort_zero_events=true low_level_event_count_gt_zero=true real_dispatch_performed=false real_desktop_touched=false low_level_event_count=14
